source_pr.title: test: fix testPointGetSuite.TestIssue20692 timeout
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #20951 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

### What is changed and how it works?
Reorder tk2 and tk3 to ensure tk3 will not acquire the pessimistic lock while tk2 is retiring.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note.
